EXERCISE / FOUNDATION / SETTING A GOAL
This exercise h elps you answer th e question:
WHAT ’ S MY GOAL?
Your financial goal for your webinar should be realistic. And it should be
based on:
• 	Your experience
• 	Your product
• 	Your list
• 	Your budget
Once you’ve reflected on the above, go ahead and set a goal for your webinar;
a goal for how much you’re going to make from your webinar within the
next 12 weeks. Find your number. Write it down (if you’re unsure, set a goal of
$2000):
______________________________________________________________________________
Now, create a stretch goal… something possible but that stretches you and
your efforts a bit further:
______________________________________________________________________________
